'''''Death Star Designer''''' was an online promotional game for ''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''. It allowed the player to create their own version of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], with customizable parts including hull size, weaponry, color and so on. While some of the customizable parts were included in the game for fun (such as ferris wheels or [[Sauna/Legends|saunas]]), and some for added power such as the [[Galaxy Gun]], all the new information on the site was potential continuity, and as such was included in the [[Holocron continuity database]].<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>

On [[November 28]], [[2008]], the site went offline.
